summary: Iteration 61: Verified two critical recurring bug fixes - (1) Profile/listing photos loading via resolveImageUrl URL rewriting, (2) Demo/test user filtering from explore endpoints. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: Avatar URL resolution verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/files/serve/honeygroove/{path} returns 404/500 for missing file (correct namespace) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/files/serve/other_app/test.png returns 403 Access denied (security) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/files/serve/etc/passwd returns 403 (path traversal blocked) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/files/serve/honeygroove/uploads/{user_id}/{image} returns 200 for actual file - PASSED
Backend: Admin user has is_hidden=True in database - PASSED
Backend: get_hidden_user_ids regex matches admin user - PASSED
Backend: All 8 explore endpoints return 200 with valid auth - PASSED
Backend: Upload endpoint requires authentication - PASSED
Frontend: resolveImageUrl correctly rewrites old URLs - VERIFIED
Frontend: Profile page avatar loads from wax-preview domain (not collector-beta) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Explore page shows no @demo users - VERIFIED
Frontend: All 15 components use resolveImageUrl for avatar rendering - VERIFIED

resolveImageUrl.test_case: katieintheafterglow's avatar_url in DB points to 'collector-beta.preview.emergentagent.com' but frontend renders it as 'wax-preview.preview.emergentagent.com'

success_rate.frontend: 100% (avatar URL resolution verified, no demo users in explore)

seed_data_creation: Created test user test_iter61@test.com for authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified two recurring bug fixes: 1) resolveImageUrl in /app/frontend/src/utils/imageUrl.js correctly rewrites old URLs from different deployment domains (e.g., collector-beta) to the current domain (wax-preview). Tested by checking katieintheafterglow's avatar_url which is stored as old domain in DB but renders as current domain. The avatar image actually loads (HTTP 200). 2) get_hidden_user_ids in /app/backend/database.py filters out is_hidden, is_test, demo/test usernames, and example.com/test.com emails. Admin user has is_hidden=True. All 8 explore endpoints use this filter. 15 frontend components use resolveImageUrl for avatar rendering. No demo/test users appear in the explore page.
